description: A scan of part of a voter-registration declaration form. The left side carries a 'RECEIVED OCT 14 2020' stamp referencing a county commissioners office and a printed declaration of U.S. citizenship and eligibility. The right side shows a signature line, a printed-name field with a handwritten name, and a date field. Portions are low-resolution.
notable_text: RECEIVED OCT 14 2020; I declare that I am a United States citizen
